title: Elymus aenaeanus
taxonomy: Elymus aenaeanus belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It is a species of grass that is often classified under the genus Elymus. Within the Poaceae family, Elymus aenaeanus is specifically classified under the subfamily Pooideae. This subfamily contains many species of grasses, often found in cool, temperate climates. benefits: Elymus aenaeanus, commonly known as the sea bluegrass, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine.
